text: collaboration.spawn_agent failed with 'no thread with id' during required read-only code review; tool should either create the thread or explain unavailable team state before accepting the call

cargo-modules dependencies --acyclic reports intra-type ownership loops (for example Budget <-> Budget::new) even with --no-owns/--no-fns/--no-types, so module-cycle checks require DOT edge extraction plus tsort
Weak-types cleanup left serde_json::json imported in verify.rs after moving response schema construction; a targeted unused-import scan before the full gate would have caught it.
apply_patch failed because I assumed generated dist-workspace.toml values instead of rereading the exact file; a pre-patch exact-target reminder would have prevented it
